title: Luffy Breaks Free
description: The fight shifts toward the great golden bell, turning victory into a promise to prove that the City of Gold exists.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Enel, Eneru, Nami, Luffy, Aisa. The fight shifts toward the great golden bell, turning victory into a promise to prove that the City of Gold exists.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It seems you dodged that well...!

summary: The fight shifts toward the great golden bell, turning victory into a promise to prove that the City of Gold exists.
